response.global_analysis: The audio features a live performance medley by Hololive 1st Gen followed by an intermission chat. The first song is 'Zettai Idol Yamenai de', but the medley arrangement differs from the provided full lyrics in the JSON reference (it jumps between sections and includes different lyrics like '絶対空で輝いて'). I am strictly following the audio and on-screen text for the transcription. The chat segment discusses four songs performed in the medley: 'Killer', 'Tetris', 'Friend Shitai', and 'Zettai Idol Yamenai de'. The video segment ends just before the next song 'Denno Daissengen' begins.

subtitles.original: ステージにいて
subtitles.english: Stay on the stage

subtitles.original: 私がもし君のとこ 離れたなら
subtitles.english: If I ever left your side...

subtitles.original: 絶対空で輝いて
subtitles.english: Definitely shine in the sky

subtitles.original: 星は街じゃ輝かないの
subtitles.english: Stars don't shine in the city

subtitles.original: 眩しい君が 世界一だよ
subtitles.english: The dazzling you are the best in the world!

subtitles.original: 好きだー！
subtitles.english: I love you!

subtitles.original: 君の夢は 何ですか？ 教えてほしい
subtitles.english: What is your dream? I want you to tell me

subtitles.original: その夢がアイドルじゃなくても 覚悟はしてるから
subtitles.english: Even if that dream isn't to be an idol, I'm prepared for it.

subtitles.original: 星のいない空 それが当たり前で
subtitles.english: A sky with no stars, that's only natural...

subtitles.original: 暗い道に目が慣れずに 踏み出すのも怖かった
subtitles.english: My eyes not used to the dark road, I was afraid to take a step forward.

subtitles.original: そんな時やっと見えた光
subtitles.english: In those times, I finally saw a light.

subtitles.original: 絶対君は歌ってて
subtitles.english: Definitely keep on singing

subtitles.original: ただのエゴと分かってても
subtitles.english: Even knowing it's just my ego...

subtitles.original: キラキラ衣装 似合うよ
subtitles.english: The sparkling outfit suits you

subtitles.original: 絶対大きなステージで
subtitles.english: Definitely on a big stage

subtitles.original: 一列で前で感じたい
subtitles.english: I want to feel it in the front row

subtitles.original: 今日の歌い方 なんか好きだなぁ
subtitles.english: The way you sing today, I kind of like it.

subtitles.original: 君の努力 私の愛
subtitles.english: Your effort, my love

subtitles.original: 成り立つこの関係は
subtitles.english: this relationship consists of...

subtitles.original: 強くてもろいの
subtitles.english: it's strong yet fragile.

subtitles.original: 星の幸せを願った
subtitles.english: I wished for the stars' happiness.

subtitles.original: だけど... でもね
subtitles.english: But... you know...

subtitles.original: だって君はアイドルよ
subtitles.english: Because you are an idol.

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: Always

subtitles.original: 初めて目が合った日から
subtitles.english: Since the day our eyes first met,

subtitles.original: 今日も明日も君ばかりだ
subtitles.english: Today and tomorrow, it's always you.

subtitles.original: 絶対アイドル辞めないで（ずっと）
subtitles.english: Absolutely, never stop being an idol (always)

subtitles.original: これは報われないおとぎ話
subtitles.english: This is an unrewarded fairy tale

subtitles.original: 恋よりももっと好きだ
subtitles.english: I love you more than love itself

subtitles.original: 魔法よどうか 解けないままで
subtitles.english: Magic, please stay unbroken.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ はーい！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Hi!

subtitles.original: と言うことで、ホロプロプロデュース曲パート1でした！
subtitles.english: So, that was the Holo-Pro Produce songs part 1!

subtitles.original: どうだったかなー？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: 選曲1曲目はまず「キラー」でございました！
subtitles.english: The first song chosen was "Killer"!

subtitles.original: いやめっちゃ良い曲なのに、めっちゃちょっと激しいダンスだったと思うんですけども
subtitles.english: It's such a good song, but I think the dance was a bit intense...

subtitles.original: いやもうなんか本当にこの曲聴いて、絶対1期生これだろうっていうね
subtitles.english: Really, listening to this song, I thought "This is definitely 1st Gen"...

subtitles.original: 思いながらちょっと歌い分けとかもね、させていただいたんですけども
subtitles.english: and I did the line distribution too.

subtitles.original: 本当に沁みた
subtitles.english: It really touched me.

subtitles.original: 沁みたでしょ？ そう、沁みたでしょ？
subtitles.english: It touched you, right? Yeah, right?

subtitles.original: そうそう、我々は常に最前線と言うことで
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah, we are always on the front lines.

subtitles.original: やったー！ いやもうね、1期生これからも頑張っていこう、最後まで目を離すんじゃないぞ！
subtitles.english: Yay! Let's keep doing our best as 1st Gen, don't take your eyes off us until the end!

subtitles.original: 辞めるな、辞めるなよ
subtitles.english: Don't quit, don't quit!

subtitles.original: そしてそして、次が？
subtitles.english: And then, next is?

subtitles.original: はい、アキロゼのテトリスをやらせていただきました
subtitles.english: Yes, I performed Aki-Rose's "Tetris".

subtitles.original: テテテテトリス！ いやこれはね、可愛かったからいつかじゃあみんなでやってみたいなと思ったの
subtitles.english: Te-te-te-tetris! This was cute, so I thought I'd like to try it with everyone someday.

subtitles.original: で、グループのこうフォーメーションとかをぐるぐるして...
subtitles.english: And doing the group formations and stuff...

subtitles.original: なんかしたけれども、それをでちょっと頑張ってもらっちゃった
subtitles.english: I had everyone work hard on that.

subtitles.original: やったー！ ありがとうみんな頑張ってくれて
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you everyone for working hard.

subtitles.original: 表情やばかった
subtitles.english: The expressions were crazy.

subtitles.original: まあなんか我々はだいぶムスッとした気がしますね
subtitles.english: Well, I feel like we were looking quite grumpy.

subtitles.original: まあそんな一面も愛してよと言うことで、はい、お願いします
subtitles.english: Well, please love that side of us too.

subtitles.original: そして？
subtitles.english: And?

subtitles.original: はい、はあちゃまは「ふれんどしたーい」！ フレンド...したかった！
subtitles.english: Yes, Haachama did "Friend Shitai"! I wanted to be... friends!

subtitles.original: と言うことで選びました。
subtitles.english: So I chose it.

subtitles.original: あの後ろの映像でね、思い出アルバムみたいに...
subtitles.english: With the video in the back like a memory album...

subtitles.original: 良かった、モニター割れてなくて良かったってなりました
subtitles.english: I'm glad, I was like "I'm glad the monitor didn't break".

subtitles.original: 割れてないですー
subtitles.english: It's not broken!

subtitles.original: はい、そして？
subtitles.english: Yes, and?

subtitles.original: まつり最後に「絶対アイドル辞めないで」！
subtitles.english: Matsuri, finally, "Zettai Idol Yamenai de"!

subtitles.original: いやこれはね、まあまつりのエゴだったとしてもみんなにはアイドルでいてほしいなという気持ちで選ばせていただきましたよ
subtitles.english: Yeah, this one, even if it's Matsuri's ego, I chose it with the feeling that I want everyone to stay as idols.

subtitles.original: この曲もなんか1期でやるとやっぱ沁みたね
subtitles.english: Doing this song with 1st Gen really touched me too.

subtitles.original: やっぱ7年目だからね、余計に良かったです
subtitles.english: Since it's the 7th year, it was even better.

subtitles.original: お、そしてこのパートが終わったと言うことで...
subtitles.english: Oh, and since this part has ended...
